events.name: detached
events.description: Fired when remote debugging connection is about to be terminated. Contains detach reason.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: The reason why connection has been terminated.

events.name: targetCrashed
events.description: Fired when debugging target has crashed

events.name: targetReloadedAfterCrash
events.description: Fired when debugging target has reloaded after crash

events.name: workerScriptLoaded
events.description: Fired on worker targets when main worker script and any imported scripts have been evaluated.
